case_for: Thielen has flashed WR2 upside with a 15.4-point outburst and a 13.0-point game within his last six contests, showing he still has weeks where he clears this threshold comfortably.
case_against: His recent scoring has been wildly inconsistent and trending toward low-floor outputs (3.2, 4.0, 7.9), suggesting his target share or big-play role may be shrinking heading into week 12.
